title: Selene
description: Bringing light to a lonely world
body:
Selene adds trinkets which use the moon's power to make exploring the dark easier for adventurers across the realm.

Amethyst thrown into water under a full moon attains a certain mystical quality to it, and forging jewelry with it this Selenic Amethyst and Copper adds a luminous quality. Wearing a full set of the jewelry may confer a certain blessing...

This mod was created for ModJam 1.17: *Be Gay Do Crimes*. I hope you enjoy it!

![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/6722691/124369363-0f60d300-dc20-11eb-960c-472c38a0828b.png)
